mapper.select: SELECT ca.APPLICATION_ID AS applicationId, ca.USER_ID AS userId, ca.APPLICATION_TYPE AS applicationType, ca.APPLICATION_STATUS AS applicationStatus, ca.REJECT_REASON AS rejectReason, ca.APPLIED_AT AS appliedAt, ca.CANCELED_AT AS canceledAt, ca.APPROVED_BY AS approvedBy, ca.APPROVED_AT AS approvedAt, c.COURSE_ID AS courseId, c.COURSE_TITLE AS courseTitle, c.COURSE_TYPE AS courseType, c.CATEGORY_TYPE AS categoryType, c.INSTRUCTOR_NAME AS instructorName, oc.LOCATION AS location, oc.APPLY_START_DATE AS applyStartDate, oc.APPLY_END_DATE AS applyEndDate, oc.COURSE_START_DATE AS courseStartDate, oc.COURSE_END_DATE AS courseEndDate FROM COURSE_APPLICATION ca JOIN COURSE c ON ca.COURSE_ID = c.COURSE_ID LEFT JOIN OFFLINE_COURSE oc ON c.COURSE_ID = oc.COURSE_ID WHERE ca.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY ca.APPLIED_AT DESC, ca.APPLICATION_ID DESC

SELECT ca.APPLICATION_ID AS applicationId, ca.USER_ID AS userId, ca.APPLICATION_TYPE AS applicationType, ca.APPLICATION_STATUS AS applicationStatus, ca.REJECT_REASON AS rejectReason, ca.APPLIED_AT AS appliedAt, ca.CANCELED_AT AS canceledAt, ca.APPROVED_BY AS approvedBy, ca.APPROVED_AT AS approvedAt, c.COURSE_ID AS courseId, c.COURSE_TITLE AS courseTitle, c.COURSE_TYPE AS courseType, c.CATEGORY_TYPE AS categoryType, c.INSTRUCTOR_NAME AS instructorName, oc.LOCATION AS location, oc.APPLY_START_DATE AS applyStartDate, oc.APPLY_END_DATE AS applyEndDate, oc.COURSE_START_DATE AS courseStartDate, oc.COURSE_END_DATE AS courseEndDate FROM COURSE_APPLICATION ca JOIN COURSE c ON ca.COURSE_ID = c.COURSE_ID LEFT JOIN OFFLINE_COURSE oc ON c.COURSE_ID = oc.COURSE_ID WHERE ca.APPLICATION_ID = #{applicationId}
mapper.update: UPDATE COURSE_APPLICATION SET APPLICATION_STATUS = 'CANCELED', CANCELED_AT = TRUNC(SYSDATE) WHERE APPLICATION_ID = #{applicationId}
